abilities.description: Draw a card, then discard a card.
Transform CARDNAME. Activate only if there are four or more permanent types among cards in your graveyard. (Artifact, battle, creature, enchantment, land, and planeswalker are permanent types.)

effect.description: Transform CARDNAME. Activate only if there are four or more permanent types among cards in your graveyard. (Artifact, battle, creature, enchantment, land, and planeswalker are permanent types.)
effect.name: SetState

abilities.description: Add X mana of any one color, where X is the number of permanent cards in your graveyard.
